context: "What do you do?" and "What do you like?" come up in every conversation. You do not need many words - you need a few patterns you can point at anything: your job, your hobbies, the things you have made.
explanation: Two ways to talk about work: trabajo en + a field (trabajo en informática = I work in IT) and trabajo como + a role (trabajo como consultor = I work as a consultant). You can also just say what you are with soy: soy ingeniero de datos. Keep both handy - you will reach for them constantly.

examples.note: trabajo en + a field or place.

examples.es: soy ingeniero de datos y trabajo como consultor
examples.en: I am a data engineer and I work as a consultant

examples.note: me gusta + a verb = I like to do something.

examples.en: I like to learn new things

examples.es: he creado una aplicación, se llama Origin
examples.en: I have created an app, it is called Origin
examples.note: he creado = I have created (he + a -ado/-ido verb = I have done).
